META AD SWIPE FILE
10X GROWTH CONFERENCE AD
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba7
Product Offer: 10X Growth
Conference Virtual Access
Creative Format: Image
Campaign Optimization:
Conversion (for Purchases)
Audiences Targeted: Detailed
Interest Targeting - Grant Cardone,
Tony, Robbins, Gary Vaynerchuk,
and “Must also Like” Engaged
Shoppers (the Engaged shoppers
audience is a hidden GEM!)
Notes: We split test a lot of
variations on this (which is why
lower number of likes, etc.) This ad
version worked because it is very
straightforward and stops users in
their tracks. The first line of any ad
is VITAL because if it’s not relatable,
catchy, or shocking then there
won’t be any interest to click the ad.
The line “Breaking News”
performed very well.
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

10X INCOME SYSTEM
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba8
Product Offer: 10X Webclass Free Webinar
Creative Format: Video
Campaign Optimization: Conversion (for Leads)
Audiences Targeted: Detailed Interest Targeting: E-commerce, Shopify,
Dropshipping
Notes: This ad works well because, while it shows lifestyle, the relatability is very high.
Grant tells a personal story and pulls the emotional strings. The immediate copy also
grabs attention: I WANT TO MENTOR YOU. The audience is also very important, as it
targets people who show an interest in things to help them succeed.
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

10X INCOME SYSTEM POLL
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba9 (poll does not display on ad link)
Product Offer: 10X Webclass Free Webinar
Creative Format: Video (with Poll!)
Campaign Optimization: Conversion (for Purchase)
Audiences Targeted: Lookalike Audience: 1% - 10% Followers (USA, CA, AU, UK)
Notes: This campaign uses a very well-kept secret on Meta: video poll ads.
Poll ads are extremely engaging and yield a lower cost-per-click than normal ads.
While clicks don’t always convert to sales, this ad definitely did. It is likely because it is
such a down-to-earth message with Grant and Elena. Also, the Lookalike audience
was effective in this situation, because it found people who would like Grant in the
major English-speaking countries.
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 6 --

10X INCOME SYSTEM POLL
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba10
Product Offer: 10X Challenge Free Signup
Creative Format: Image
Campaign Optimization: Conversion (for Leads)
Audiences Targeted: Detailed Interest Targeting: All Household Income %’s, Small
Business Owners, Business Owners, Founders
Notes: This ad worked very well because the image is bright and eye-catching.
While it helps to have star power, it should be noted that any images of people’s
faces will help conversion. The ad copy challenges users to step out of their comfort
zone and is congruent to the ad targeting. The key to winning with ads is
congruency with creatives, audiences, offers, and landing pages.
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

THE 10X RULE BOOK
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba11
Product Offer: Free Book Offer (Pay S+H)
Creative Format: Image
Campaign Optimization: Conversion (for Leads)
Audiences Targeted: Cart abandoners (exclude all buyers)
Notes: This ad works well because it directly retargets people who started
purchasing the product and did not complete their order. The image is big and bold
and speaks very directly to the audience. While an ad like this with a very small and
targeted audience will have a much higher cost per exposure, the high conversion
will more than makeup for it. We find these ads have our highest return on ad
spend (ROAS).
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

CREATE WEALTH IN REAL ESTATE BOOK
Ad Link: 10xresource.com/fba12
Product Offer: Free Book Offer (Pay S+H)
Creative Format: Video
Campaign Optimization: Conversion (for Purchases)
Audiences Targeted: Facebook & Instagram Engagers in Last 90 Days
Notes: The video and copy utilize a “Shock and Awe” approach to grab people’s
attention. This works especially well when it is paired with warm audiences who had
previously engaged on Grant’s social media. Since they had previously engaged, they
likely appreciate Grant’s raw and direct style.
Ad Preview:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
